commands.command: mkdir -p node_modules/.bin && printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\necho hook-path-ok' > node_modules/.bin/test-hook-cmd && chmod +x node_modules/.bin/test-hook-cmd
echo test > file.txt && git add file.txt

commands: git commit -m 'test' 2>&1 | grep -o 'hook-path-ok' # hook should find test-hook-cmd via PATH
